fields.label: Service
fields.description: The name of the service

fields.label: External Account ID
fields.description: The ID of the account in the external service

fields.label: Account Name
fields.description: The name associated with the account in the external service. Often this will be a company name (e.g., "My Toystore, Inc.").

fields.label: Logo URL
fields.description: The URL to a logo image for the external service

fields.label: Link URL
fields.description: The URL to a page where the integration with the external service can be managed in the third-party's website

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your ActiveCampaign server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: External ID
fields.description: The ID of the order in the external service. ONLY REQUIRED IF EXTERNALCHECKOUTID NOT INCLUDED.

fields.label: External Checkout ID
fields.description: The ID of the cart in the external service. ONLY REQUIRED IF EXTERNALID IS NOT INCLUDED.

fields.label: Order Source
fields.description: The order source code (0 - will not trigger automations, 1 - will trigger automations)

fields.label: Customer Email
fields.description: The email address of the customer who placed the order

fields.label: Total Price
fields.description: The total price of the order in cents, including tax and shipping charges. (i.e. $456.78 => 45678). Must be greater than or equal to zero.

fields.label: Order Currency
fields.description: The currency of the order (3-digit ISO code, e.g., "USD")

fields.label: Connection ID
fields.description: The ID of the connection from which this order originated

fields.label: Customer ID
fields.description: The ID of the customer associated with this order

fields.label: Creation Date
fields.description: The date the order was placed (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Abandoning Date
fields.description: The date the cart was abandoned. REQUIRED ONLY IF INCLUDING EXTERNALCHECKOUTID. (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Products
fields.description: All ordered products (JSON object; supported keys: name, price, quantity, externalid, category, sku, description, imageUrl, productUrl)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: shippingAmount, taxAmount, discountAmount, orderUrl, externalUpdatedDate, shippingMethod, orderNumber)

fields.description: Host of your ActiveCampaign server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)
